overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a hooded character with shield and sword walking through ancient Alexandria. The character moves from a covered courtyard through bustling market streets and finally enters a tannery building, showcasing detailed historic Egyptian architecture and NPC daily life.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered courtyard with central fountain and lattice walls

events.description: character turns left while walking to navigate around the central fountain
approaching the decorative iron gate to exit the courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered courtyard, circling the central fountain while heading toward the exit gate

entered.detail: circular stone fountain with water basin in the middle of the courtyard
tall stone columns supporting the courtyard arches
wooden lattice walls covered with green climbing vines and red flowers
intricate black iron gate marking the courtyard exit
stone seating along the right wall of the courtyard
large terracotta pottery urns placed near the wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a semi-covered stone courtyard featuring a central fountain, surrounded by columns and lattice walls covered in flowering vines. The space is quiet with no other people present, and the character circles the fountain while heading toward an ornate iron gate exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient city street transitioning to marketplace

events.description: exits the covered courtyard through the iron gate into the open street
entering the marketplace area with wooden carts and fabric awnings becoming visible

agents.ego_description: moving along the cobblestone street toward the marketplace, passing stone buildings and palm trees

entered.detail: cobblestone street surface extending into the distance
two-story stone building with classical columns and red awnings
tall palm trees visible down the street
wooden cart with large wheels parked near market stalls
fabric canopies shading the market stalls

segments.scene_description: The character exits the courtyard into a sunlit cobblestone street lined with classical stone buildings and palm trees. As the character progresses, the environment transitions into a marketplace with wooden carts and fabric awnings becoming prominent along the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy outdoor marketplace with vendors and goods

events.description: character turns right to examine the pottery and fabric stalls
character turns left to continue through the market square

agents.ego_description: walking through the marketplace, examining various stalls selling fabrics, pottery, and produce while navigating around NPCs

notable_agents.action: vendor sitting at a pottery stall arranging clay vessels
pedestrian in blue tunic walking through the market square

entered.detail: stall displaying folded textiles and carpets
wooden shelves stacked with terracotta pots and amphorae
wicker baskets filled with apples and pomegranates
mature tree providing shade in the market square
building entrance with classical columns and pediment
wooden planks laid over the cobblestones for walking

segments.scene_description: The character explores a bustling marketplace filled with stalls selling fabrics, pottery, and fresh produce. NPC vendors and pedestrians populate the square, with a large olive tree providing shade. The character turns to examine different stalls while walking over wooden planks laid across the cobblestones.

scene_state.functional_zone: tannery interior with stone walls and dye pits

events.description: enters the tannery building from the marketplace, transitioning to indoor space
location name 'Alexandria' appears on screen identifying the city

agents.ego_description: walking into the tannery building, passing large dye pits and entering the carpeted interior room

entered.detail: large stone basins filled with red and yellow dye liquids
arched stone doorway leading into the building interior
whitewashed stone walls of the tannery structure
red patterned rugs covering the stone floor inside
rough stone walls with small window openings
exposed wooden rafters supporting the roof

segments.scene_description: The character enters a tannery building, leaving the marketplace behind. The exterior features large stone dye pits filled with colored liquids. Inside, the space opens into a room with stone walls, wooden ceiling beams, and patterned carpets on the floor, with sunlight streaming through small windows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded, floral courtyard into the vibrant chaos of a city marketplace before concluding inside a quiet industrial building. It begins in a semi-covered stone courtyard, circling a central fountain amidst columns and flowering vines before passing through an ornate iron gate. As the character exits, the quiet atmosphere shifts into a sunlit cobblestone street lined with palm trees, which gradually expands into a bustling marketplace filled with fabric awnings and wooden carts. The scene then opens further into a crowded square where the camera weaves past vendors and pedestrians under the shade of a large olive tree. Finally, the movement leads away from the market noise and into a tannery, passing large outdoor dye pits before entering a room of stone walls and patterned carpets illuminated by streaming sunlight.
